executive_summary: Harbour Tours spends too much owner time on enquiries, scheduling, quote follow-up, and review requests. The best opportunities are low-risk automation around inbox triage, booking coordination, and follow-up reporting.

pain_points.title: Manual enquiry triage
pain_points.description: Tour enquiries arrive by email and phone and are manually copied into a spreadsheet before follow-up.

pain_points.title: Slow quote follow-up
pain_points.description: The owner personally checks quote status and sends reminders.

quick_wins.title: Shared inbox triage assistant
quick_wins.description: Classify enquiries, draft replies, and extract requested dates and group size for staff review.

quick_wins.title: Post-tour review follow-up
quick_wins.description: Send templated review requests and flag unhappy customers for manual follow-up.

deeper_opportunities.title: Booking workflow hub
deeper_opportunities.description: Move spreadsheet-based scheduling into a single booking operations table with automated status changes.

tool_recommendations.name: Airtable
tool_recommendations.purpose: Track enquiries, bookings, quote status, and customer follow-up in one operational view.

tool_recommendations.name: Zapier
tool_recommendations.purpose: Connect Gmail, forms, booking records, and reminder messages.

actions: Route new enquiries into a booking table
Prepare reply templates for staff approval
